revision.comment: [[Template:Strongbad]] is only for use in template documentation, guidelines and other Wikipedia-internal purposes. Do not use it in actual articles.
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: [[Image:PD-icon.svg|15px|link=|alt=]] ''This article incorporates text from ''{{#if:{{{title|}}}{{{work|}}}|{{{title|{{{work|}}}}}}|<noinclude>TitleGoesHere</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[title missing]}}</includeonly>}}''{{#if:{{{author|}}}|, by {{{author}}}}}, a publication from {{#if:{{{year|}}}{{{date|}}}|{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}|<noinclude>YYYY</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[year missing]}}</includeonly>}}, now in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]] in the United States.''{{#if:{{{title|<noinclude>-</noinclude>}}}||[[Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]]}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: [[Image:PD-icon.svg|15px|link=|alt=]] ''This article incorporates text from ''{{#if:{{{title|}}}{{{work|}}}|{{{title|{{{work|}}}}}}|<noinclude>TitleGoesHere</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[title missing]}}</includeonly>}}''{{#if:{{{author|}}}|, by {{{author}}}}}, a publication from {{#if:{{{year|}}}{{{date|}}}|{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}|<noinclude>YYYY</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[year missing]}}</includeonly>}}, now in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]] in the United States.''{{#if:{{{title|<noinclude>-</noinclude>}}}||[[Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]]}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: [[Image:PD-icon.svg|15px|link=|alt=]] ''This article incorporates text from ''{{#if:{{{title|}}}{{{work|}}}|{{{title|{{{work|}}}}}}|<noinclude>TitleGoesHere</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[title missing]}}</includeonly>}}''{{#if:{{{author|}}}|, by {{{author}}}}}, a publication from {{#if:{{{year|}}}{{{date|}}}|{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}|<noinclude>YYYY</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[year missing]}}</includeonly>}}, now in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]] in the United States.''{{#if:{{{title|<noinclude>-</noinclude>}}}||[[Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]]}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[Image:PD-icon.svg|15px|link=|alt=]] ''This article incorporates text from ''{{#if:{{{title|}}}{{{work|}}}|{{{title|{{{work|}}}}}}|<noinclude>TitleGoesHere</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[title missing]}}</includeonly>}}''{{#if:{{{author|}}}|, by {{{author}}}}}, a publication from {{#if:{{{year|}}}{{{date|}}}|{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}|<noinclude>YYYY</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[year missing]}}</includeonly>}}, now in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]] in the United States.''{{#if:{{{title|<noinclude>-</noinclude>}}}||}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

[[Image:PD-icon.svg|15px|link=|alt=]] ''This article incorporates text from ''{{#if:{{{title|}}}{{{work|}}}|{{{title|{{{work|}}}}}}|<noinclude>TitleGoesHere</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[title missing]}}</includeonly>}}''{{#if:{{{author|}}}|, by {{{author}}}}}, a publication from {{#if:{{{year|}}}{{{date|}}}|{{{year|{{{date|}}}}}}|<noinclude>YYYY</noinclude><includeonly>{{error|[year missing]}}</includeonly>}}, now in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]] in the United States.''{{#if:{{{title|<noinclude>-</noinclude>}}}||}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
